title: Validate Documentation Accuracy and Usability
description: Test all documented commands and workflows in the new root README to ensure they work as described and are clear to new contributors.
details:
- Set up a fresh clone of the repository and follow the README step-by-step.
- Run all setup, development, testing, and deployment commands as documented.
- Note any discrepancies or unclear steps and update the README as needed.
- Optionally, have a new developer or team member perform the same validation for unbiased feedback.
test_strategy:
- Confirm that a clean setup using only the README results in a working local environment and successful deployment steps.
- Gather feedback from at least one new user and incorporate improvements.

title: Review and Refactor Subdirectory READMEs
description: Audit, trim, or remove the existing READMEs in `apps/api` and `apps/app` to avoid redundancy and ensure they defer to the root README.md.
details:
- Open `apps/api/README.md` and `apps/app/README.md`.
- Remove redundant content now covered in the root README.
- Replace with a brief note pointing to the root README for setup, development, and deployment instructions.
- Retain only component- or directory-specific notes if necessary.
test_strategy:
- Verify that subdirectory READMEs contain no outdated or redundant instructions.
- Confirm that all essential information is present in the root README and referenced appropriately.

title: Draft Comprehensive Root README.md
description: Create a detailed and well-structured README.md at the project root, consolidating and enhancing information from subdirectory READMEs and project files.
details:
- Structure the README with sections: Project Overview, Features, Tech Stack, Prerequisites, Getting Started, Project Structure, Available Scripts, Testing, Deployment, and Contribution Guidelines.
- Include badges (build status, license, etc.) at the top.
- Add a high-level architecture diagram (can be ASCII or link to an image).
- Ensure all commands, environment variables, and setup steps are accurate by referencing code, scripts, and configuration files.
- Link to official documentation for key technologies (tRPC, Terraform, Cloudflare D1).
- Use clear formatting and code blocks for commands and configuration examples.
test_strategy:
- Manually follow all setup, test, and deployment instructions in a clean environment to ensure accuracy.
- Review the README for completeness, clarity, and professional formatting.
- Solicit feedback from a new developer to validate usability.
